{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232046413B26FFB4C9623B23E7BA"}"},"total":22},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7554468945026515736","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真好看。小说引人入胜，分析案情丝丝入扣，推理严谨，作者文笔真是很好，故事的描述使人如同身临其境，引导人一直看下去。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758915988,"group_id":"7545315805844474904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyFhexECSAFOWmSwwjsmjCrHgm2Ama7zFemh7+4/roqS","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/34757d4b630242008e31a7406d5765d1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793225&x-signature=Y6MbeR8tKP2qNhEyNtAacLnxL6E%3D","user_id":"1750046498627629","user_name":"瓣香吟馆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1750046498627629","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545315805844474904","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+九岁神探+奶娃+破案爽文】
前世顶级刑侦专家苏辰穿越成九岁奶娃，开局被貌美嫂子搂在怀里哄睡！
苏辰懵了：什么情况？我成九岁小屁孩了？
还没搞清楚状况，老爹和大哥冲进屋里：快跑吧，这案子破不了全家喝西北风！
眼看全家要完蛋，苏辰奶声奶气的说：“慌什么？这案子我破了！”
随后，案发现场，苏辰断案入神
“死者不是被淹死的，是被人害死的！”
“死者在生前和人有关争执，指甲中的碎肉便是证明！”
“犯罪嫌疑人就在现场，给我关门抓狗！”
一桩悬案就此解开...
从此，苏辰扶摇直上，凭借一手断案神技，年纪轻轻便位极人臣...
皇上：有苏爱妾是我大召国之幸，赏金万两，当朝首辅之位非苏爱妾莫属！
苏辰：等等...我成一人之下，万人之上了？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1af4020b3abe879987a009186fea7dbe","author":"剑啸南山","author_id":"","book_id":"7545315805844474904","book_name":"大唐九岁小神探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1673人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7545458373580311576","read_count":"1673","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"285546"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"133","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,大唐,女帝,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cd8a598ec343f8c1981683e8c1ffda96~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454001&x-signature=647H3Ys3qnqzdPHXE7eUO%2BQp5mM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"13"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232046413B26FFB4C9623B23E7BA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_c
